name: dj-music
description: DJ techno music library management — 50 MCP tools for set building, audio analysis, playlist expansion, and Yandex Music integration

args: cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null && set +a && exec uv run fastmcp run fastmcp.json --reload --reload-dir app --no-banner

cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null && set +a && SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="${DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN:?DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN not set in .env}" exec npx -y @supabase/mcp-server-supabase@0.7.0 --read-only --project-ref="${DJ_DB_PROJECT_REF:?DJ_DB_PROJECT_REF not set in .env}"
